Name: FMovieSceneSequencePlaybackSettings
Description: Settings for the level sequence player actor.

Variables.Name: LoopCount
Variables.Description: Number of times to loop playback. -1 for infinite, else the number of times to loop before stopping

Variables.Name: PlayRate
Variables.Description: The rate at which to playback the animation

Variables.Name: bRandomStartTime
Variables.Description: Start playback at a random time

Variables.Name: StartTime
Variables.Description: Start playback at the specified time

Variables.Name: bRestoreState
Variables.Description: Flag used to specify whether actor states should be restored on stop

Variables.Name: bDisableMovementInput
Variables.Description: Disable Input from player during play

Variables.Name: bDisableLookAtInput
Variables.Description: Disable LookAt Input from player during play

Variables.Name: BindingOverrides
Variables.Description: Interface that defines overridden bindings for this sequence
